name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: San Francisco, CA location of Western Union Money Order Only at 221 Sansome St offers 24-hour money order services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 221 Sansome St in San Francisco, CA is a standalone money order service center in the Financial District. Open 24 hours every day of the week, this location provides quick access to money orders without banking hours restrictions. The facility is located on Sansome Street, a major corridor in downtown San Francisco.

This San Francisco location specializes in money order issuance and verification. Customers can purchase money orders of various amounts for domestic and international delivery. Contact this location at +1 415-296-5141 to confirm current services or ask about specific money order needs.

For San Francisco residents and visitors needing a money order outside standard banking hours, this 24-hour Sansome Street location eliminates scheduling conflicts. Bring a valid photo ID and the necessary funds. Western Union Money Order Only serves as a reliable alternative to traditional check-cashing when fast, secure payment is required.
pros: Extensive network of 1,850+ agent locations integrated into Walmart, grocery chains, and retail partners across the US
Fast in-person cash pickup capability at participating locations using MTCN
Money order services available as alternative to checks with cashing at participating locations
International money transfers with automatic currency conversion at time of transfer
Online pre-registration option to reduce in-person counter time
Bill payment services for utilities, rent, and car payments at participating agent locations
Established fraud prevention and encryption security measures protecting transfers
cons: Transaction-based fee structure with varying costs depending on method, payment option, and destination—no ongoing account benefits
No currency exchange services at physical locations; international rates set at time of transfer with no customer control
Limited payment options at some locations—credit card acceptance varies and is not universal across all agent locations
Service hours depend on host location (Walmart, grocery store, etc.) rather than dedicated Western Union hours
Online and in-person pricing differs, requiring users to comparison shop using their cost calculator before sending
best_for: Consumers making occasional domestic or international money transfers who need in-person payment options
Individuals without bank accounts or traditional banking relationships seeking cash-based money services
People needing to send bill payments (rent, utilities) at physical retail locations
Recipients expecting money transfers who need quick cash pickup rather than account deposit
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers who need occasional in-person money transfer, bill payment, or money order services and value widespread retail accessibility over dedicated banking services. The primary caveat is that this is a transaction-fee model with variable pricing—users should verify costs before sending and understand that each transfer incurs separate fees based on amount, destination, and payment method chosen.
services: In-person domestic money transfers at agent locations
In-person international money transfers with currency conversion
Money order purchase and cashing at participating locations
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating locations
Cash pickup via MTCN at participating Western Union agent locations
Western Union prepaid Visa card option for receiving money
Online money transfer pre-registration to complete in person
Mobile app for money transfer initiation
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) generation for transfer tracking
Agent location finder tool for nearby service points
Bank partner services at select financial institutions
Retail location integration at Walmart and grocery chain partners
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 221 Sansome St, San Francisco, CA. 24-hour money order services.
